summary: Full-stack engineer shipping React and TypeScript products with measurable latency and reliability wins.

bullets: Built payment reconciliation dashboard in React and TypeScript, reducing manual review time by 45% for 12 operations analysts
Architected Redis-backed caching layer for billing APIs, cutting p99 latency from 820ms to 190ms across 3 services
Led migration to Next.js App Router for internal tools, improving build times by 38% and enabling SSR for compliance views
Shipped observability widgets in 6 weeks using React and GraphQL, adopted by 400+ enterprise dashboards
Optimized bundle size by 22% via code-splitting and lazy loading, improving LCP scores on customer-facing pages

projects.name: ResumeFlow
bullets: Built LaTeX-to-PDF pipeline with 4-layer compile fallback, achieving 99.2% successful exports in production beta

projects.name: OpenMetrics CLI
bullets: Developed CLI profiler in Rust that reduced CI flake detection time from 4 hours to 25 minutes for 90+ microservices
